serious_candidates.one_liner: Combined occupancy + TMA/L2 effective bandwidth + precision-specific throughput analytical predictor.
serious_candidates.targeted_limitation: FA4 paper roofline ignores occupancy, memory-hierarchy bandwidth, and precision throughput.
serious_candidates.why_now: Baseline accepted with explicit caveats naming these exact terms; falsifiable by held-out validation.
serious_candidates.prior_work_overlap: Extends arXiv 2603.05451v1 roofline with methodology from arXiv 2605.04178v1 and constants from arXiv 2512.02189v1.
serious_candidates.anti_win_condition: Adding the terms does not reduce held-out MAPE because the dominant error source is elsewhere (e.g., implementation-specific scheduling).
serious_candidates.minimal_validation: Implement predictor with modular terms; ablate each term on held-out validation; report delta MAPE and bottleneck accuracy.
serious_candidates.abandonment_condition: Combined model fails to beat baseline MAPE by >= 5 percentage points or falls below useful-improvement threshold after two rounds of constant calibration.

serious_candidates.one_liner: Precision-only throughput and exponential emulation correction.
serious_candidates.targeted_limitation: Roofline treats precision only through FLOP count.
serious_candidates.why_now: Cheapest first ablation of C1; directly tests whether precision is the dominant missing term.
serious_candidates.anti_win_condition: BF16/FP16 and FP8/FP4 runtimes scale with bytes and FLOPs already, so precision throughput is not the bottleneck.
serious_candidates.minimal_validation: Run precision-only variant on held-out validation across all four precisions.
serious_candidates.abandonment_condition: Precision-only variant does not improve MAPE on FP8/FP4 subset.

serious_candidates.one_liner: Occupancy-only correction based on tile size and SM resource limits.
serious_candidates.why_now: Direct test of the occupancy hypothesis; can be implemented without memory bandwidth calibration.
serious_candidates.anti_win_condition: FA4 tile choices already achieve near-peak occupancy on B200.
serious_candidates.minimal_validation: Run occupancy-only variant on held-out validation; compare to baseline and C1.
serious_candidates.abandonment_condition: Occupancy-only variant does not improve MAPE on small-S configs.

sections.collapse_rationale: C1 subsumes C2 and C3 as ablation terms, so the experiment can test all three hypotheses in one model while C2 and C3 provide orthogonal falsification.

summary: Candidate idea frontier for the FlashAttention-4 B200 runtime model idea pass.
title: Candidate Idea Frontier: FlashAttention-4 B200 Runtime Model Idea Pass
